channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Report: Suzuki in trade talks with Astros for Kyle Tucker
item.description: CHICAGO— The hot stove is heading up for the Chicago Cubs during the 2024 Winter Meetings and the club is reportedly in trade talks for one of the best outfielders in baseball — Kyle Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Left-hander Max Fried agrees to $218 million, 8-year contract with Yankees, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The New York Yankees hope Max Fried pitches like he did in 2021 — when he won the World Series clincher for the Atlanta Braves.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deebo Samuel doubles down on frustrations after social media post flagged by community notes on X
item.description: Niners star Deebo Samuel doubled down on a social media post he made this week expressing frustrations over the limited opportunities that he blamed for his lack of productivity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 16, 2024
item.description: The guys pick four CIF state championship games involving Bay Area teams, including Pittsburg vs. Lincoln-San Diego, Amador Valley vs. Frontier-Bakersfield, Moreau Catholic vs. Lindsay, De La Salle vs. Mater Dei-Santa Ana.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 39 as Thunder beat Mavericks 118-104, advance to NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 39 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Dallas Mavericks 118-104 on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup quarterfinal.
item.dc:creator: Cliff Brunt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lanier scores 22 points as No. 1 Tennessee beats Miami 75-62 at Jimmy V Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chaz Lanier scored 22 points, and No. 1 Tennessee beat struggling Miami 75-62 on Tuesday night at the Jimmy V Classic in Madison Square Garden. Igor Milicic Jr.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rangers agree on $75 million, 3-year deal to keep RHP Nathan Eovaldi, AP source says
item.description: The Texas Rangers and right-hander Nathan Eovaldi have agreed on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person with knowledge of the deal tells The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Caitlin Clark admits feeling 'privilege' as a White person, says WNBA was 'built on' Black players
item.description: After being the subject of cultural debates throughout her rookie season, Caitlin Clark admitted to feeling "privilege" as a White woman.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Bucs finally see first place after a tough battle against Raiders
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers won their third straight game, 28-13, over the Las Vegas Raiders and climbed back into first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Former White Sox MVP Dick Allen elected to National Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: Former Chicago White Sox Most Value Player Dick Allen has been elected to the National Baseball Hall of Fame by the Classic Era Committee.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baker Mayfield throws for 3 TDs, Bucs take over 1st in NFC South with 28-13 win over Raiders
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 295 yards and three touchdowns, helping the Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Las Vegas Raiders 28-13 and take over sole possession of first place in the NFC South on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
